title: TypeException after calling UDF in other than sys schema (when it is initialised)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_testing (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, angle DOUBLE);
CREATE VIEW radian_view AS SELECT angle, angle * PI() / 180 AS radians FROM fuzz_testing;
SELECT radians FROM radian_view WHERE angle = 55.81689;
key_bug_features: Calling UDF in non-sys schema causes TypeException
